subject: feat(debug): add structured debugLog module, React DebugPill, clipboard fallbacks
body:
Replace simple {time, message, stack} error array with full pub/sub debug
system. debugLog.js provides a 200-entry circular buffer with typed entries,
console interception, global error capture, and report generation with URL
param redaction. React DebugPill renders in a separate root (#debug-root) with
3 tabs (Log, Environment, PWA Diagnostics) using inline styles to survive CSS
failures. copyToClipboard.js adds ClipboardItem Blob, writeText, and textarea
fallbacks. All error routing (ErrorBoundary, App, pwa, HamburgerMenu) updated
from window.__debugPushError to direct debugAdd imports.

Tags: debug, ui, pwa, refactor
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-system
Semver: minor
